mapper.insert: insert into `point-detail` (user_id, type, point, comment, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{userId}, #{type}, #{point}, #{comment}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{updateBy});
INSERT INTO `point-detail` (user_id, type, point, comment, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) VALUES (#{userId}, 2, #{point}, #{comment}, NOW(), #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy})
